race.description: Meredith Roofing Super Maiden Showcase Plate
race.comment: BORJNORD (2) showed plenty of grit on debut at Newcastle when beaten a whisker after being trapped wide the entire trip. With natural improvement and a better draw he will take plenty of stitching. TRIUMVIRATE (17) resumes for the Hayes yard after failing to fire on debut at Canterbury when well supported but he had excuses. Looks to have returned in great order after three strong jump outs, so a bold showing is expected. JASIRA (10) returns for the Cavanoughs, readied with two trials. Went close to breaking through in both runs in last campaign and looks to have taken the steps forward during the break. Blinkers go on first time. Will pay to monitor. MAKE MINE MOET (11) also resumes and looks best of the rest.
